description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a rich blue fabric, featuring clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The sofa has two large, rectangular back cushions and two cylindrical bolster pillows, all in matching blue material. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a uniform and contemporary appearance. The stitching is visible and contrasts subtly with the upholstery, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise minimalist design. The base of the sofa is solid and fully enclosed, with no visible legs, contributing to its sturdy and grounded look. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor spaces.
description: A modern blue two-seater sofa with straight armrests, large back cushions, and cylindrical bolsters, featuring visible stitching and a fully enclosed base. Its clean, boxy design is both contemporary and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large back cushions, two cylindrical bolsters, and the straight, wide armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick armrest and the depth of the seat, with the back and bolster cushions visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, flat back panel and the continuous upholstery with visible stitching.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat depth, with cushions partially visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular back cushions and two cylindrical bolster pillows, all loose and uniform in size, with a single seat cushion spanning the width.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and boxy armrests at seat height, fully padded and covered in matching blue fabric, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed and extends to the floor, giving a block-like appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions for support, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and visible contrasting stitching along the seams.
